zh.York, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾約克
zh.Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素
zh.Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆
zh.Liddesdale, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾利德斯達爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gunnora de Albini Brito於大約1178年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素時，她的父親Sir Ralph Brito Albini54歲，母親Sybil de Valognes52歲。她於1191年之後與Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1193年之後。

zh-hans.York, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾約克

zh-hans.Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆
zh-hans.Liddesdale, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾利德斯達爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gunnora de Albini Brito于大约1178年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Brito Albini54岁，母亲Sybil de Valognes52岁。她于1191年之后与Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1193年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Albini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Pasquale, Aldo, Amalio, Americo, Armando, Carlo, Caterina, Claudio, Gino, Mario, Maurizio, Nichola, Nicola, Severino, Vittorio.
patronymic or plural form of   Albino  .

variants.name: Albino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ramon, Manuel, Ana, Carlos, Julio, Luis, Raul, Ruben, Alfonso, Andres, Angel.  Italian Pasquale, Angelo, Antonio, Carmine, Giovanni, Luigi, Sal, Santo, Saverio, Ubalda.

nameMeanings.name: Brito
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Francisco, Pedro, Luis, Ana, Carlos, Miguel, Javier, Jorge, Rafael.  Portuguese Paulo, Joao, Joaquim, Duarte, Martinho.

Portuguese, Galician, and Spanish: habitational name from any of various places called Brito. This surname is also found in western India (mainly Maharashtra and Goa), where it was taken by Portuguese colonists. Compare   Britto   and   De Brito  .

variants.name: Britto
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Alvaro, Dominga, Eufemia, Fermino, Josue, Juana, Pedro, Romulo, Serafin.
Portuguese: variant of   Brito  . This surname is also found in western India, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists.
English: ethnic name from medieval Latin Brito ‘Briton or Breton’, translating Norman French (Le) Bret (compare Brett ).

variants.name: De Brito
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fernando, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Alvaro, Angelina, Belmira, Carlos, Jose.  Portuguese Margarida, Serafim.
Portuguese, Galician, and Spanish: habitational name, with the preposition de ‘from’, for someone from any of various places called Brito. Compare Brito .

en.lifeSummary: When Gunnora de Albini Brito was born about 1178, in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir Ralph Brito Albini, was 54 and her mother, Sybil de Valognes, was 52. She married Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel after 1191, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 1193.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gunnora de Albini Brito est née environ 1178, à Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Brito Albini, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Valognes, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel après 1191, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après 1193.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gunnora de Albini Brito um 1178 in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Brito Albini 54 und ihre Mutter Sybil de Valognes 52. Sie hat nach 1191 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1193.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gunnora de Albini Brito è nata il circa 1178 nel Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Brito Albini, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Sybil de Valognes, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel dopo il 1191, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 1193.

ja.lifeSummary: Gunnora de Albini Britoが約1178年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Brito Albiniは54歳，母Sybil de Valognesは52歳であった。1191年以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでNicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1193年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gunnora de Albini Brito(이)가 대략 1178년 영국 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Brito Albini(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Valognes(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 1191년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1193년 이후 사망했다.

mn.York, Yorkshire, England: Eoforwic, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gunnora de Albini Brito nasceu aproximadamente 1178, em Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Brito Albini, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Valognes, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel após 1191, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1193.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gunnora de Albini Brito родилась около 1178 г. в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Brito Albini было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Valognes, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel после 1191 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 1193 г.

sm.about 1178–after 1193: e tusa o le 1178–ina ua ma'ea le 1193

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gunnora de Albini Brito nació aproximadamente 1178, en Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Brito Albini, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Sybil de Valognes, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel después de 1191, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 1193.
